It is our distinct pleasure to announce that the project coordinated by

from the Department of Economics and entitled “Green Transition and AI-Based Twin Transformation in Turkey: New Dynamics of Employment and Policy Requirements” has been funded by

TUBİTAK 3005 – Social Sciences and Humanities Program.

The project aims to analyze Turkey’s twin transformation (green and AI-driven technological transformation) from an employment perspective, examining the opportunities and challenges in the labor market. It seeks to develop policy recommendations that will contribute to sustainable development goals and strengthen workforce capacity.

We congratulate our faculty member for her achievement and wish her continued success.

We also would like to thank Prof. Dr. Hasan Tekgüç, Prof. Dr. Alp Erinç Yeldan and Prof. Dr. Meltem Ucal for their valuable contributions during the panels.
